title: Analytics - Login Success
scenario: Successful Poly account login via mobile app logs Firebase Analytics events with default tracking elements
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Account screen (tap the Account icon/profile icon).
3. On the Account screen, tap 'Sign In' or 'Log In'.
4. Enter valid Poly account credentials (email and password).
5. Tap the 'Sign In' or 'Log In' button to submit.
6. Observe the app behavior after the login attempt.
expected: The user is successfully logged in. The login event is tracked in Firebase Analytics with default elements: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
